  acknowledgment_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable reference number assigned to the acknowledgment event.']
  acknowledgment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the associate completed the acknowledgment.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of compliance verification after acknowledgment (e.g., compliant, non‑compliant, pending review).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the acknowledgment record was first created in the system.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the acknowledgment is no longer valid and must be renewed.']
  method varchar [note: 'Mechanism used for acknowledgment: electronic signature, paper form, or Learning Management System.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Optional free‑text comments entered by the associate or auditor at the time of acknowledgment.']
  policy_acknowledgment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the acknowledgment (e.g., active, expired, revoked, pending).']
  required_reacknowledgment_date date [note: 'Date by which the associate must re‑acknowledge the policy if periodic renewal is required.']
  signature_hash varchar [note: 'Cryptographic hash of the electronic signature for integrity verification.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system (e.g., Workday HCM, Kronos, custom LMS) that captured the acknowledgment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the acknowledgment record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing associate acknowledgment of compliance policies, codes of conduct, and mandatory SOPs. Captures acknowledgment ID, associate reference, policy reference, acknowledgment date, acknowledgment method (electronic signature, paper, LMS), and expiration date for policies requiring periodic re-acknowledgment. Provides audit evidence that associates have read and agreed to key compliance policies such as the code of conduct, anti-harassment policy, and food safety SOPs.'
}

Table compliance.age_restricted_sale {
  age_restricted_sale_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each age-restricted sale event.']
  associate_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the store associate who performed the age verification.']
  membership_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to loyalty.membership. Business justification: Age‑restricted sale compliance report must identify the loyalty member who made the purchase.']
  override_age_restricted_sale_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on age_restricted_sale (override_age_restricted_sale_id)']
  product_item_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the age‑restricted product sold (SKU/UPC).']
  store_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the store where the sale occurred.']
  transaction_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the POS transaction that includes this age‑restricted sale line.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the age‑restricted sale record was first captured in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the sale amount.']
  customer_apparent_age varchar [note: 'Age estimated or disclosed by the customer at the time of verification.']
  id_type_presented varchar [note: 'Type of government‑issued ID the customer presented for age verification.']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Sequential order of the line within the parent transaction.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'Category of the age‑restricted product sold.']
  quantity varchar [note: 'Number of units of the product sold in this line.']
  refusal_reason varchar [note: 'Reason provided when verification was refused (e.g., underage, invalid ID).']
  register_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the POS register or self‑checkout kiosk used for the transaction.']
  sale_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of the age‑restricted sale line.']
  sale_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the age‑restricted sale was completed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the age‑restricted sale record.']
  verification_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the age verification check.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of age-restricted product sales events (alcohol, tobacco, lottery, certain OTC medications) at Grocery POS and self-checkout, capturing the ID verification check performed. Captures transaction ID, store location, register ID, sale date and time, product category (alcohol, tobacco, lottery), ID type presented (drivers license, passport, state ID), customer apparent age, associate ID who verified, verification outcome (approved, refused), and refusal reason. Supports alcohol beverage control compliance and tobacco retail license requirements.'
}

Table compliance.risk {
  risk_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each compliance risk record.']
  owner_associate_id varchar [note: 'FK to workforce.associate']
  parent_risk_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on risk (parent_risk_id)']
  product_item_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.product_item. Business justification: Product‑level risk assessments (e.g., contamination risk) are recorded in Compliance Risk; linking to product_item enables the Product Risk Dashboard.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.program. Business justification: Risks are registered under a compliance program.']
  risk_associate_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee responsible for managing the risk.']
  risk_escalation_contact_associate_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the person to contact for escalations.']
  affected_business_area varchar [note: 'Business function or division impacted by the risk.']
  classification varchar [note: 'Broad classification indicating the nature of the risk.']
  compliance_area varchar [note: 'Specific compliance domain the risk belongs to.']
  control_description varchar [note: 'Narrative of the control(s) currently in place to mitigate the risk.']
  control_effectiveness_score varchar [note: 'Effectiveness rating (0‑5) of existing controls mitigating the risk.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the risk record was first created.']
  documentation_link varchar [note: 'URL or path to supporting documentation for the risk.']
  inherent_impact_score varchar [note: 'Potential business impact rating (0‑5) if the risk materialises before controls.']
  inherent_likelihood_score varchar [note: 'Probability rating (0‑5) of the risk occurring before controls.']
  inherent_risk_rating varchar [note: 'Combined inherent risk rating derived from likelihood and impact.']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent risk review activity.']
  mitigation_due_date date [note: 'Target date for completing mitigation activities.']
  mitigation_plan varchar [note: 'Planned actions and steps to reduce residual risk.']
  mitigation_status varchar [note: 'Current execution status of the mitigation plan.']
  next_review_due_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next scheduled risk review.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority level used for scheduling remediation activities.']
  regulation_reference varchar [note: 'Official code or citation of the regulation (e.g., 21 CFR Part 11).']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing agency associated with the compliance requirement. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|USDA|DEA|OSHA|FTC|EPA|HIPAA|SOX — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  residual_impact_score varchar [note: 'Impact rating (0‑5) after controls are applied.']
  residual_likelihood_score varchar [note: 'Probability rating (0‑5) after accounting for controls.']
  residual_risk_rating varchar [note: 'Overall residual risk rating after controls.']
  review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent formal risk review.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the risk domain.']
  risk_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the nature and cause of the risk.']
  risk_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the compliance risk.']
  risk_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the risk identification.']
  risk_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the risk.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Severity rating reflecting potential business disruption.']
  tags varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of user‑defined tags for categorisation.']
  treatment_strategy varchar [note: 'Chosen approach to address the risk.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the risk record.']

  Note: 'Compliance risk register record identifying, assessing, and tracking enterprise compliance risks across all regulatory domains. Captures risk ID, risk name, risk category (food safety, workplace safety, data privacy, environmental, licensing, financial), affected business area, inherent likelihood and impact scores, current control effectiveness, residual risk rating, risk owner, risk treatment strategy (accept, mitigate, transfer, avoid), and risk review date. Provides the enterprise compliance risk posture view for the Chief Compliance Officer.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_change {
  regulatory_change_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the regulatory change record.']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_program. Business justification: Regulatory changes impact a compliance program; adding compliance_program_id links the change to its program.']
  superseded_regulatory_change_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on regulatory_change (superseded_regulatory_change_id)']
  attached_document_path varchar [note: 'File system or storage path to the regulatory document or filing associated with the change.']
  change_announced_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory change was first announced to the organization.']
  change_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier assigned to the regulatory change (e.g., CHG‑2024‑001).']
  change_type varchar [note: 'Nature of the regulatory change: new rule, amendment to an existing rule, or repeal of a rule.']
  compliance_category varchar [note: 'High‑level compliance domain the change belongs to.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory change record was first created in the lakehouse.']
  enacted_effective_date date [note: 'Actual date the regulation becomes legally binding after enactment.']
  impact_assessment_status varchar [note: 'Progress of the impact assessment for the regulatory change.']
  impacted_business_areas varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of business domains (e.g., Store Operations, Pharmacy, Supply Chain) affected by the change.']
  implementation_owner_name varchar [note: 'Name of the individual responsible for implementing the regulatory change.']
  implementation_owner_role varchar [note: 'Job role or title of the implementation owner (e.g., Compliance Manager).']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory change was last reviewed for relevance or status.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments captured by compliance analysts.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the regulatory change.']
  proposed_effective_date date [note: 'Date the regulator proposes the change to become effective.']
  regulation_name varchar [note: 'Official name or title of the regulation (e.g., Food Safety Modernization Act).']
  regulation_section varchar [note: 'Specific section, clause, or article of the regulation that is changing.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing agency or authority issuing the regulation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|USDA|OSHA|EPA|FTC|DEA|State|HIPAA|PCI|SOX — promote to reference product]']
  regulatory_change_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the regulatory change and its intent.']
  regulatory_change_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the regulatory change.']
  required_operational_changes varchar [note: 'Summary of operational actions needed to comply with the change (e.g., label redesign, process update).']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Overall risk rating associated with non‑compliance.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system or source that supplied the regulatory change record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the regulatory change record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record tracking proposed and enacted regulatory changes that may impact Grocery operations, including new FDA food labeling rules, OSHA standard updates, state privacy law amendments, EPA refrigerant regulation changes, and minimum wage law updates. Captures change ID, regulatory body, regulation affected, change description, proposed effective date, enacted effective date, impact assessment status, impacted business areas, required operational changes, and implementation owner. Drives proactive compliance gap analysis and remediation planning.'
}

Table compliance.weights_measures {
  weights_measures_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each weights and measures compliance record.']
  associate_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the inspector responsible for the calibration.']
  prior_calibration_weights_measures_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on weights_measures (prior_calibration_weights_measures_id)']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.program. Business justification: Weights and measures devices are governed by a compliance program.']
  store_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the store where the device is installed.']
  calibration_certificate_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the calibration certificate issued by the certifying authority.']
  calibration_method varchar [note: 'Method used to calibrate the device.']
  certification_date date [note: 'Date the device received its initial compliance certification.']
  certification_expiry_date date [note: 'Date the current certification becomes invalid and must be renewed.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance state of the device with applicable state and federal regulations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the compliance record was first created in the system.']
  device_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or label assigned to the weighing or measuring device.']
  device_serial_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturer‑assigned serial number that uniquely identifies the device across the enterprise.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Category of the device used for weight or measure capture.']
  inspector_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person who performed the most recent calibration or certification inspection.']
  jurisdiction_state varchar [note: 'U.S. state code governing the metrology requirements for the device. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: AL|AK|AZ|AR|CA|CO|CT|DE|FL|GA|HI|ID|IL|IN|IA|KS|KY|LA|ME|MD|MA|MI|MN|MS|MO|MT|NE|NV|NH|NJ|NM|NY|NC|ND|OH|OK|OR|PA|RI|SC|SD|TN|TX|UT|VT|VA|WA|WV|WI|WY — promote to reference product] ']
  last_calibrated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the device was last calibrated.']
  measurement_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of what the device measures (e.g., weight, volume, dimension).']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure used by the device for reporting values.']
  next_calibration_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next mandatory calibration of the device.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or observations.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the compliance record.']
  variance_tolerance_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'Maximum allowable weight variance in kilograms as defined by state metrology standards.']
  variance_tolerance_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum allowable variance expressed as a percentage of the measured value.']
  weights_measures_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the device within the store.']

  Note: 'Weights and measures compliance tracking for scales, scanners, and measuring devices at store locations. Captures device ID, certification date, next calibration due date, inspector, jurisdiction, compliance status, and variance tolerances per state metrology requirements.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_document {
  compliance_document_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for compliance_document']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.program. Business justification: Compliance documents are owned by a compliance program.']
  superseded_compliance_document_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on compliance_document (superseded_compliance_document_id)']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the document was approved.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who approved the document for active status.']
  checksum varchar [note: 'Checksum (e.g., SHA‑256) for integrity verification of the document file.']
  compliance_area varchar [note: 'Business domain or regulatory focus of the document (e.g., food safety, workplace safety, accessibility).']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Classification of the document\'s sensitivity.']
  document_format varchar [note: 'File format of the stored document.']
  document_number varchar [note: 'External reference number or code assigned to the document by the issuing authority.']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Category of the compliance document indicating its purpose and content.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the document becomes legally effective.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the document expires or is no longer in force; null if indefinite.']
  file_size_bytes varchar [note: 'Size of the document file in bytes.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether compliance with this document is mandatory for operations.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Organization or agency that issued the compliance document.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic or regulatory jurisdiction to which the document applies.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the document was most recently reviewed for relevance and accuracy.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next mandatory review of the document.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the document record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the document record.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Specific regulatory agency (e.g., FDA, OSHA, ADA) governing the document.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the document.']
  storage_path varchar [note: 'Logical path or URI where the document is stored in the lakehouse.']
  title varchar [note: 'Human‑readable title of the compliance document.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the document, incremented on each revision.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who initially created the document record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for compliance_document. Referenced by compliance_document_id.'
}

Table compliance.training_requirement {
  training_requirement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for training_requirement']
  prerequisite_training_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on training_requirement (prerequisite_training_requirement_id)']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.program. Business justification: Training requirements are defined by a compliance program.']
  assessment_required boolean [note: 'Specifies if an assessment or test follows the training.']
  certification_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the certification expires and must be renewed.']
  certification_obtained boolean [note: 'Indicates whether completion yields a certification.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the training requirement record was first created.']
  delivery_mode varchar [note: 'Method by which the training is delivered.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the training content and objectives.']
  duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Typical length of the training session in minutes.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the training requirement becomes effective.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the training requirement expires or must be refreshed.']
  mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the training is mandatory for the assigned role.']
  provider_contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the training provider contact.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing agency or standard that mandates the training.']
  required_frequency_months varchar [note: 'How often the training must be repeated, expressed in months.']
  requirement_code varchar [note: 'Internal alphanumeric code used to reference the requirement.']
  requirement_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the training requirement.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the training requirement.']
  training_provider varchar [note: 'Organization or vendor delivering the training.']
  training_type varchar [note: 'Category of compliance training (e.g., Food Safety, OSHA).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the training requirement record.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User or system that created the training requirement record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for training_requirement. Referenced by training_requirement_id.'
}
